commands: runuser -l ec2-user -c 'export SKIP_VALIDATION=True DS_TAG=1.4.0 NGIAB_TAG=v1.7.0 && /home/ec2-user/datastreamcli/scripts/datastream -s DAILY -n $NPROCS -F s3://ciroh-community-ngen-datastream/forcings/v2.2_hydrofabric/ngen.DAILY/forcing_$RUN_TYPE_L/$INIT/ngen.t$INITz.$RUN_TYPE_L.forcing.$FCST.VPU_$VPU.nc --FORCING_SOURCE NWM_V3_$RUN_TYPE_H_$INIT_$MEMBER -d /home/ec2-user/outputs -g s3://ciroh-community-ngen-datastream/resources/v2.2_hydrofabric/geopackages/VPU_$VPU/nextgen_VPU_$VPU.gpkg -N s3://ciroh-community-ngen-datastream/resources/v2.2_hydrofabric/bmi_configs/lstm_0/VPU_$VPU/ngen-bmi-configs.tar.gz -R https://ciroh-community-ngen-datastream.s3.amazonaws.com/realizations/lstm/realization_rust_lstm_troute.json --S3_BUCKET ciroh-community-ngen-datastream --S3_PREFIX outputs/lstm_0/v2.2_hydrofabric/ngen.DAILY/$RUN_TYPE_L/$INIT/$MEMBER/VPU_$VPU'
